items.briefing:
Australian small and medium businesses are embracing AI tools but many are not updating their processes to match, according to new research — a gap that can create security risks when new technology outpaces proper oversight. Separately, a major international law enforcement operation saw the Netherlands seize 800 servers and arrest two people linked to supporting cyberattacks, a reminder that criminal infrastructure enabling attacks on organisations like yours is actively being dismantled globally.

**Practical tip:** If your team is using AI tools at work, make sure there's a clear policy on what data can — and can't — be entered into them.

featured.title: Australian SMEs adopt AI but lag on workflow change
featured.quote: Australian SMEs risk falling behind by adopting AI without modernizing underlying business processes.
